summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification COMPLETE - Clear button functionality and logo display in Company dropdown tested successfully. Both modal Clear button and header Clear button work without crashing the app. Logos load correctly from database for popular companies (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, AMZN, META) and fallback placeholders display for companies without logos.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review: clearDropdownSelection and clearAllFilters functions properly reset filter state to empty arrays [] instead of null
Logo URLs correctly come from company_fundamentals_cache database collection, not string concatenation
Safe array checks implemented: (filter && filter.length > 0) instead of direct null checks
FilterChip component handles empty arrays correctly with safeValues = values || []

success_rate.backend: 100% (tickers API returns correct logo_url from database)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bugs verified fixed: 1) Clear button in filter dropdowns no longer crashes with 'Cannot read properties of null' error - filters reset to empty arrays [] not null, 2) Company logos load from database (eodhistoricaldata.com URLs stored in company_fundamentals_cache), 3) Companies without logos show letter placeholder fallback. Multi-select filters working correctly.

clear_button_modal_footer.test_flow: Open Company filter -> Select company -> Apply -> Re-open modal -> Click Clear button in footer
clear_button_modal_footer.result: App does NOT crash, modal closes, filter cleared, posts reload

clear_button_header.test_flow: Apply any filter (Sector/Exchange/Company) -> Click red 'Clear' button in header
clear_button_header.result: App does NOT crash, all filters cleared, posts reload

logo_display_from_database.fallback: Companies without logos show letter placeholder (e.g., AACB shows document icon)

features_verified.multi_select_filters: PASS - Can select multiple items and apply
features_verified.clear_dropdown_selection: PASS - Modal Clear button clears selection and closes modal
features_verified.clear_all_filters: PASS - Header Clear button clears all active filters
features_verified.company_logos: PASS - Logos display for popular companies from database
features_verified.logo_fallback: PASS - Letter/document placeholder for companies without logos
